reviews.comment:
Desastre los playeros pelotudeando ayer martes 30/03/22 a las 17. La manguera no cortó y se desbordó, mínimo  5 a 10 litros, no lo podían cortar... me llenaron el auto de nafta y me cobraron todo lo desbordado porque no había encargado para subsanar el error. (Martes a las 17 y ya no hay nadie)
Lo barato es caro...hay que ir a shell

(Translated by Google)
Disaster! The gas station attendants were messing around yesterday, Tuesday, March 30, 2022, at 5 PM. The pump didn't shut off and overflowed, at least 5 to 10 liters. They couldn't stop it... they filled my car with gas and charged me for all the overflow because I hadn't ordered a replacement to fix the mistake. (Tuesday at 5 PM and there's no one there anymore)
You get what you pay for... I should go to Shell.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXOVpHcEVREAE
